evidence: The paper explicitly plans to evaluate feature importance "through model agnostic techniques such as SHAP" rather than impurity-based methods. Section 2.3.6 states interpretability will be achieved via SHAP evaluation, with no mention of Gini or MDI importance. External validation uses predictive accuracy metrics (C-index, AUC, sensitivity/specificity), not importance ranking, so conclusions focus on model discrimination ability rather than feature magnitude or ranking.
